Video.summary: Bull rider gets tossed into a puddle; a boy takes a - vase to the head; and a hamster - pees in a girl's pocket.
Video.title: Episode 617

Video.summary: Two men jump on a log and fall; boys fight over a present; and a ring - bearer loses his pants.
Video.title: Episode 618

Video.summary: Dad breaks the diving board; a boy falls out of a - horse-drawn carriage; a man jumping - stones falls in a river.
Video.title: Episode 619

Video.title: Episode 1416
